evals.prompt: Hey, can you take a look at my draft and leave comments? Don't edit anything directly.
evals.expected_output: The draft file should have [!comment] callouts inserted after relevant paragraphs, with no direct edits to the original text.

evals.prompt: There are some comments in this doc — can you answer the ones that need answering?
evals.expected_output: Existing [!comment] callouts should have threaded replies added, and actionable ones should be addressed or resolved.

evals.prompt: Flag anything in this essay that needs a source or citation.
evals.expected_output: The essay should have [!comment]- [flag] callouts inserted after paragraphs that make claims without citations.
